_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Infants (Less than 1 year of age): Vomiting
Infants (Less than 1 year of age): Poor Weight gain
Infants (Less than 1 year of age): Irritability
Infants (Less than 1 year of age): Feeding refusal or dysphagia
Infants (Less than 1 year of age): Recurrent Pneumonia
Infants (Less than 1 year of age): Asthma and upper airway symptoms
Infants (Less than 1 year of age): Apnea or apparent life threating events
Children: Heart burn and retrosternal chest pain

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes indicate detailed history, signs & symptoms, and indication for procedure?
Did the endoscopy report show presence and severity of esophagitis or complications like ulcer, stricture, Barrett's esophagus?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?
Did the Intra operative procedure clinical photograph suggest that the procedure was performed for GERD surgery?

common_queries: Clinical notes lack detailed history, signs & symptoms, or indication for procedure.
Upper GI endoscopy report is missing or incomplete.
Endoscopy report does not show presence and severity of esophagitis or complications (ulcer, stricture, Barrett's esophagus).
Intra-operative procedure clinical photograph does not suggest that the procedure was performed for GERD surgery.
Detailed procedure / operative notes are missing or incomplete.
Discharge summary does not include follow-up advice at the time of discharge.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Anti GERD Surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation.
